sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111073" key="filobou/pais" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-βούπαις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">παιδος</itype>, <sense id="n111073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving full-grown boys,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.255</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
